mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, phone, email, avatar_url, user_type, status, is_verified, auth_status, region) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatarUrl}, #{userType}, #{status}, #{isVerified}, #{authStatus}, #{region})
